step_rationale: Mitochondrial deacetylase regulating macrophage oxidative stress and inflammatory activation in plaques.
mechanism: SIRT3 modulates macrophage oxidative stress and inflammation, with reduced activity contributing to plaque destabilization and Type 1 MI risk.

references.title: Untargeted metabolomics identified kynurenine as a predictive prognostic biomarker in acute myocardial infarction.
Empagliflozin, an SGLT2 Inhibitor, Reduced the Mortality Rate after Acute Myocardial Infarction with Modification of Cardiac Metabolomes and Antioxidants in Diabetic Rats.
references.journal: The Journal of pharmacology and experimental therapeutics
